name: Entity Validator
description: Validates entity YAML frontmatter against JSON Schema definitions before write. Returns HTTP 422 with per-field errors on invalid data so only well-formed entities reach the database.
author: BiloxiStudios

strict_mode.label: Strict Mode
strict_mode.description: When enabled, entities with unknown fields are also rejected. When disabled (default), unknown fields are allowed with a warning.

validate_on_write.label: Validate on Write
validate_on_write.description: Intercept entity.pre_write events and reject writes that fail schema validation.
